workflow_name: View Database Storage Groups, Volumes, and Volume Interpretation via DB2 System Catalog

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type a schema name or pattern to filter the database list on the System Catalog Objects screen
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the Databases list
Type line command G in the Select field next to the target database to view its storage groups
Press Enter to navigate to the Storage Groups list for the selected database
Type line command VOL in the Select field next to the target storage group to view its volumes
Press Enter to navigate to the Volumes list for the selected storage group
Type line command I in the Select field next to the target volume to view its interpretation details
Press Enter to display the Interpretation of an Object in SYSVOLUMES screen
Press PF3 to return to the Volumes list
Press PF3 to return to the Storage Groups list
Press PF3 to return to the Databases list
Press PF3 to return to the System Catalog Objects screen
Press PF3 to return to the DB2 Admin main menu
